flags.note: Backslash/merged-letter artifacts (e.g. "h h\ f", "e\ g", "eei ghhif", "chodníkom k L Priečnymi") likely represent degraded point-labels/subscripts (e.g. h1, e1) lost during OCR/extraction. Left untouched per SS21.3 protected zone -- needs verification against the original 1928 source image, not guessing.

"autor: Vesna (Slovakia by Drawning)" -- "Drawning" may be a typo for "Drawing" in the artist/page name, or may be the actual name of a Facebook/art page. Left unchanged as a possible protected proper name pending confirmation.

"sme sa dostali po modrej (prudký stupák) a potom po hrebeni prídete až ku kameňolomu" switches from 1st person plural past (sme sa dostali) to 2nd person plural present (prídete) mid-sentence. Likely blended blog/guide voice; left unchanged as stylistic, not a clear-cut grammar error.

Bibliography (Janšák 1928, Novák 2011) is embedded as plain paragraphs in body, not as a content.sources component; blogPost.citations[] is empty (matches sanityFlags: zeroCitations). Flagged per SS21.5 BIBLIO_IN_BODY -- structural, not a grammar fix.
